title: Nokia Over Netherite
body:
Bedrock edition version soon to uploaded here:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/nokia-over-netherite

 

This resource pack replaces

Ancient Debris

Netherite Block

Netherite Ingot

Netherite Sword

Netherite Axe

Netherite Pickaxe

Netherite Shovel

Netherite Hoe

Netherite Helmet

Netherite Chestplate

Netherite Leggings

Netherite Boots

 

And replaces them with their Nokia Counterparts
